channel.title: Ranks on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts
channel.description: Recent content in Ranks on KMA Fitness & Martial Arts

item.title: Black Belts
item.description: All Ranks Black Belts The highest rank in the Team Fabricio Philippines lineage. Each black belt represents years of dedicated training, competition, and growth. 5th 5th Degree Stephen Kamphuis BB 2004 → 1st 2007 → 2nd 2010 → 3rd 2012 → 4th 2017 → 5th Aug 2022 Profile → 3rd 3rd Degree Jangwon Byeon BB May 2014 → 1st May 2017 → 2nd May 2020 → 3rd May 2023

item.title: Blue Belts
item.description: All Ranks Blue Belts A solid foundation in fundamentals — demonstrating effective technique, defensive awareness, and growing mat confidence. 4th Stripe Abigail Obias Arellano November 2025 Alexander Tiongson Adam Leonard Austria Arnie Brioso July 25 Carlos Garcia June 25 Francis Carlo Serrano Dec 22 Efren Bautista Sept 23 Jason Fernandez Blue Dec 22 / Nov 23 / June 24 Jaan Davy Caraga Jericho Melchor Dec 23 Lucy Calaycay Dec 23

item.title: Brown Belts
item.description: All Ranks Brown Belts Refining and mastering technique — preparing for the responsibility of the black belt. 4th Stripe John F. Garcia 2nd March 2023 → 3rd Nov 23 → 4th May 24 Kenneth Menia Oct 2024 Christopher Cortez 1st July 2022 → 2nd March 2023 → Dec 2023 → 4th May 24 Francis Angelo Castillo 3rd Oct 2024 → 4th June 2025 Darren Ngo B. Belt March 2022 → 1st Dec 2022 → 2nd June 2023 → Dec 24

item.title: Junior Grades
item.description: All Ranks Junior Grades Our youngest practitioners — building discipline, confidence, and technique from an early age. Green Belt James Carl Cantera 3 Stripes Raphael Facundo (Cenojas-Davao) Victor Santos Gabriel Yap Darlen Jenise Mitchell Orange Belt Athena Tatel Aiden Manibusan Andrei Obiso Ary Mahibubani 1 Stripe Antonio Luis Roberto Andy Pajaron Anita Jane Aguilar Ali Pagayatan 1 Stripe Blake Clement Siu Arianne Mahibubani Cassidy Tanddo Cyron Ray Bertis Daryl Caitlin Teo

item.title: Purple Belts
item.description: All Ranks Purple Belts Advanced understanding of technique and strategy — developing a personal game and the ability to teach. 4th Stripe Abraham Alzate Ivan Lord U. Regudo Nov 2024 Mel Andrew Palogan Dec 23 / June 24 / June 25 Juan Francis Lagniton Sept 25 Joanne Pauline Tan Sept 25 Rodel Pocholo Neri July 25 Timothy Alfaro Dec 24 / July 25 3rd Stripe Andy Robano Dec 23

item.title: White Belts
item.description: All Ranks White Belts The beginning of the journey. Learning fundamental positions, escapes, and submissions. Note: White belt is the beginner belt within Brazilian Jiu Jitsu. Stripes must be maintained through consistent training — white belt stripes are held for one year. If you do not train and grade within this period, the stripes may be withdrawn. 4th Stripe Amber Rose Lecito July 25 Allan Geromio Ali Espina Sept 25
